display.purpose: Homepage nameplate only. Letters designed to collide; sub-1.0 leading is correct.

headline.purpose: Full-viewport post hero titles. Monumental scale, meant to overwhelm.

title.purpose: Featured essay titles, compact hero headings. One step below headline.

body.purpose: All prose. Never below 17px. Line-height 1.82 is for reading, not scanning.

label.purpose: Nav, kickers, timestamps, captions. Mono only. Never for prose.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Nav link colour, hover colour shifts, link transitions.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Border colour, background fill, icon colour transitions.

motion.name: image-lift
motion.purpose: Essay card image brightness transition on hover.

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Taxonomy label. The one place Warm Gold appears as a chromatic surface on hover.
components.css: .ds-tag-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b89b72; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(184,155,114,0.32); border-radius: 3px; padding: 3px 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-tag-chip:hover { background: rgba(184,155,114,0.14); border-color: rgba(184,155,114,0.55); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Used for all-essays navigation and post-nav at-rest state. Words lead, shape follows.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 15px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 22px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #b89b72; background: rgba(184,155,114,0.14); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed frosted-glass site header. 56px tall. Logo in mono, links in mono uppercase. No underlines.
components.html:
JRBNZ
  • Essays
  • Photos
  • Now
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; padding: 0 clamp(24px, 5vw, 60px); background: rgba(9,11,13,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.32em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }

components.name: Essay Card
components.description: Image-first. No container, no shadow, no background. Image + title + meta. The image IS the card.
components.html:
The Stage Is Never Empty

May 2026  ·  Theatre
components.css: .ds-essay-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; border: none; } .ds-essay-card-img-wrap { overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16/9; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-essay-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: brightness(0.9); display: block; transition: filter 0.3s; } .ds-essay-card:hover .ds-essay-card-img { filter: brightness(1); } .ds-essay-card-title { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin: 0 0 5px; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-essay-card:hover .ds-essay-card-title { color: #b89b72; } .ds-essay-card-meta { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52); margin: 0; }

components.name: Feature Card (Hero Overlay)
components.description: Absolute-positioned over a full-bleed image. Frosted glass background separates text from photography.
components.html:
Essays

Why Theatre Must
Remain Dangerous

Read essay
components.css: .ds-feature-card { background: rgba(8,9,10,0.78); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); padding: 24px 24px 20px; border-radius: 0; } .ds-feature-kicker { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b89b72; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-feature-title { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: clamp(22px, 3.2vw, 44px); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-feature-meta { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b89b72; margin: 0; }

components.name: Post Navigation
components.description: Prev / next navigation between posts. Ghost border at rest, Warm Gold on hover.
components.html: ← PreviousOn the Architecture of SilenceNext →What the Stage Knows
components.css: .ds-post-nav { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .ds-prevnext-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; padding: 16px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-prevnext-item:hover { border-color: rgba(184,155,114,0.4); background: rgba(184,155,114,0.14); } .ds-prevnext-next { align-items: flex-end; text-align: right; } .ds-prevnext-dir { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); line-height: 1; } .ds-prevnext-item:hover .ds-prevnext-dir { color: #b89b72; } .ds-prevnext-title { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.35; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52); } .ds-prevnext-item:hover .ds-prevnext-title { color: #b89b72; }

narrative.overview:
This is the design language of a serious publication from the bottom of the world — not a tech product, not a lifestyle blog, not an agency showcase. The canvas is deep cinematic black (#090b0d). Reading content surfaces on a warm linen interior (#f1eadf). Between them, text floats at precisely calibrated opacity: 85% for body, 52% for supporting roles, 35% for timestamps and labels.

Georgia carries the entire type burden. No display face, no grotesque pair. A single serif family at extreme scale (up to 160px on the home nameplate, line-height 0.86) and modest scale for body copy at 17–20px, line-height 1.82. The mono font appears only for UI chrome. The contrast between the two creates hierarchy without a third typeface.

The Warm Gold (#b89b72) is the single accent. Its rarity is the point. The colour strategy is committed: Projection Black holds the surface for the vast majority of every screen. Warm Gold speaks only when something matters.
keyCharacteristics: Georgia only for prose and display; mono only for UI chrome and labels
Tight negative tracking at large scale (-0.065em at display), releasing toward 0 at body
Surface inversion: dark canvas transitions to warm linen for extended reading
Single accent, used sparingly — never decoratively
No shadows; depth through tonal layering and opacity steps

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Warm Gold is the only accent in the palette. If you find yourself reaching for a second colour, solve it with scale, weight, or opacity instead.

rules.name: The Opacity Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Text on the dark canvas is always a transparency over Projection Black: 85% for primary, 52% for muted, 35% for subtle. This trio is the depth system.

rules.name: The Georgia-Only Rule
rules.body: Georgia is the only prose typeface. Never introduce a sans-serif for display, headings, or pull quotes.

rules.name: The Scale-Down-Never Rule
rules.body: Body copy minimum is 17px. Do not go smaller for captions or secondary content. Demote those to label scale in monospace instead.

rules.name: The Tight-at-Large Rule
rules.body: Tracking tightens as size increases. Never apply positive tracking to a serif at display or headline scale.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any component at rest. Depth comes from the tonal stack.

rules.name: The Blur-is-Functional Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter is permitted only where it solves a legibility problem caused by a live background. Decorative glass panels are prohibited.

dos: Do use Georgia for all headings, titles, display text, and prose.
Do tighten letter-spacing as text size increases: -0.065em at display, releasing toward 0 at body.
Do use the .surface-invert pattern for extended reading sections — dark canvas to linen interior is the system signature.
Do run body text at a minimum of 17px. The site's author prefers scale; err large.
Do keep Warm Gold appearing on no more than 10% of any given screen surface.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on all transitions.
Do treat image brightness as a palette decision: brightness(0.72–0.92) on the dark canvas.
Do use monospace only for UI chrome — nav, kickers, timestamps, captions. Never as a prose substitute.
donts: Don't introduce a second typeface family. Georgia and the system mono are the complete set.
Don't add a second accent colour. Solve emphasis problems with scale, weight, or opacity.
Don't build generic dev portfolio patterns — dark card grids, hero metric blocks, icon + heading + text repetition.
Don't soften toward lifestyle blogger warmth: pastel tints, rounded card grids, Instagram-adjacent curation.
Don't introduce SaaS patterns: gradient CTAs, feature grids, sticky floating buttons, conversion-funnel copy.
Don't over-engineer motion: no scroll-jacking, no cursor effects, no parallax. Restraint is the statement.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured stripe accent on any component.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Warm Gold is a solid colour.
Don't use box-shadow on components at rest.
Don't go below 17px for any prose or readable body content.
